failure_modes.cause: BPR set at 5.0 bar, below required 39.6 bar
failure_modes.mitigation: Adjust BPR to meet or exceed 39.6 bar requirement

failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 40°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: High viscosity of TBAB/EG solvent at operating temperature
failure_modes.mitigation: Ensure reactor tubing is rated for pressure > 40 bar

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=2.79798 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Test BPR adjustment to 40 bar and verify system stability under operating conditions
Measure pressure drop across reactor with TBAB/EG solvent at 120°C to confirm design assumptions
